subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body:
Hi CapStore Team,

I've been using the app for 8 months and love it! One thing that would make it even better is offline mode. Would you consider adding this in a future update?

Thanks,
Avery Brown

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body:
Hi CapStore Team,

I've been using the app for 20 months and love it! One thing that would make it even better is two-factor authentication. Would you consider adding this in a future update?

Thanks,
Casey Rodriguez
